header.container: fixed w-full top-0 z-50 bg-[rgb(249,250,255)]/60 backdrop-blur-lg

logo.text: text-xl font-bold bg-gradient-to-r from-cyan-600 to-blue-600 bg-clip-text text-transparent

megaMenu.button: flex items-center text-sm font-medium text-gray-600 hover:text-cyan-600 transition-colors
megaMenu.dropdown: absolute mt-2 w-[800px] p-8 rounded-2xl shadow-xl bg-white border border-gray-100 opacity-0 invisible group-hover:opacity-100 group-hover:visible transition-all duration-200

featured.wrapper: flex items-center justify-between bg-gradient-to-r from-cyan-50 to-blue-50 p-4 rounded-xl
featured.badge: inline-block px-2 py-1 text-xs font-semibold bg-cyan-100 text-cyan-600 rounded-full
featured.title: text-sm font-medium text-gray-900 mt-1
featured.link: flex items-center text-sm font-medium text-cyan-600 hover:text-cyan-700

languageSelector.button: flex items-center gap-2 text-sm font-medium text-gray-600 hover:text-cyan-600
languageSelector.dropdown: absolute mt-2 w-48 rounded-xl shadow-lg bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-lg ring-1 ring-black/5 opacity-0 invisible group-hover:opacity-100 group-hover:visible transition-all duration-200
languageSelector.item: block px-4 py-2 text-sm text-gray-700 hover:bg-cyan-50 hover:text-cyan-600

rightSection.signIn: hidden md:inline-flex items-center justify-center px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 hover:text-cyan-600 transition-colors
rightSection.getStarted: hidden md:inline-flex items-center justify-center px-6 py-2.5 text-sm font-medium text-white bg-cyan-600 hover:bg-cyan-700 rounded-full transition-all duration-300 hover:shadow-lg hover:shadow-cyan-500/25 hover:-translate-y-0.5

mobileMenu.button: inline-flex items-center justify-center p-2 rounded-lg text-gray-600 hover:text-cyan-600 hover:bg-cyan-50
mobileMenu.dropdown: absolute mt-2 w-56 rounded-xl shadow-lg bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-lg ring-1 ring-black/5 opacity-0 invisible transition-all duration-200 ease-in-out transform scale-95
mobileMenu.item: block px-4 py-2 text-sm text-gray-700 hover:bg-cyan-50 hover:text-cyan-600
mobileMenu.productsButton: w-full text-left px-4 py-2 text-sm text-gray-700 hover:bg-cyan-50 hover:text-cyan-600 flex items-center justify-between
mobileMenu.categoryItem: block px-4 py-1.5 text-sm text-gray-700 hover:text-cyan-600
mobileMenu.languageButton: flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-gray-700 hover:text-cyan-600
mobileMenu.languageItem: block px-4 py-1.5 text-sm text-gray-700 hover:text-cyan-600
mobileMenu.signIn: block px-4 py-2 text-sm text-gray-700 hover:bg-cyan-50 hover:text-cyan-600
mobileMenu.getStarted: block px-4 py-2 text-sm text-cyan-600 hover:bg-cyan-50
